name: Ansh Madaan
education: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology, B.Tech CGPA: 9.17; Govt. Boys Senior Secondary School, Class XII (PSEB) 95.4%

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a hybrid CNN–LSTM with attention model achieving 97% accuracy with subject-wise validation. Applied bandpass filtering and temporal windowing for robust EEG feature extraction and improved interpretability using Grad-CAM, Integrated Gradients, and attention weight visualization.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Built a secure chatbot access system using real-time face recognition with OpenCV. Integrated facial authentication with conversational AI for personalized interaction, ensuring high-accuracy face matching with efficient encoding and secure data handling.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a voice-controlled terminal enabling execution of complex shell operations via natural language. Integrated Google’s generative AI models for intelligent command understanding and published it as a PyPI package.
